creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Fix one portlint warning. Actually, I kept reminding myself to run
portlint(1) several times and then eventually forgot to do it.

  $ portlint -C
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [3]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [4]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [5]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [6]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [7]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/games/kanatest/pkg-plist: [8]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
  WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a WITHOUT_NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
  WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.

WITHOUT_NLS is false positive, the port doesn't support disabling
gettext dependency.

--- b.diff begins here ---
diff --git games/kanatest/Makefile games/kanatest/Makefile
index 14a57de..7e4740c 100644
--- games/kanatest/Makefile
+++ games/kanatest/Makefile
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
 USE_GNOME=	gtk20 libxml2
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 MAKE_ENV+=	LIBINTL="-lintl"
 
 post-patch:	.SILENT
diff --git games/kanatest/pkg-plist games/kanatest/pkg-plist
index 1c16172..38d1132 100644
--- games/kanatest/pkg-plist
+++ games/kanatest/pkg-plist
@@ -15,8 +15,6 @@ share/locale/pl/LC_MESSAGES/kanatest.mo
 share/locale/pt/LC_MESSAGES/kanatest.mo
 share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/kanatest.mo
 share/pixmaps/kanatest.png
-@exec %%LOCALBASE%%/bin/gtk-update-icon-cache -qft %D/share/icons/hicolor
-@unexec %%LOCALBASE%%/bin/gtk-update-icon-cache -qft %D/share/icons/hicolor
 @exec %%LOCALBASE%%/bin/update-desktop-database %D/share/applications 2>/dev/null || true
 @unexec %%LOCALBASE%%/bin/update-desktop-database %D/share/applications 2>/dev/null || true
 @dirrmtry share/applications
--- b.diff ends here ---
